subject: Re: Epstein - letter to friends.doc
body:
I think we need to address the fourteen year old head
on... leave out the fbi,, add video camera story, but
also deal with the prosecutor vs d.a.  ,, as they are
the real battle

--- Mitch Webber <mwebber@law.harvard.edu> wrote:

> 
> Mr. Epstein,
> 
> Here's what I've drafted so far.  Alan asked me to
> send this to you for 
> your comments on tone and content.
> 
> - Mitch


__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?

http://mail.yahoo.com
